metadata.description: Reduce growth technology exposure when oil and long rates rise together, especially during tight liquidity regimes.
metadata.author: AlphaNet Example

themes.name: Defensive Equities
themes.description: Defensive equity candidates for risk-off rotation.

signals.name: TradingAgents decision for AMD
signals.description: TradingAgents decision for AMD on 2025-12-31: Buy
AI Hedge Fund decision for AMD on 2025-12-31: Hold

signal_interests.description: Twenty trading day percentage change in WTI crude oil proxy using USO.
signal_interests.reason: Rules reduce growth technology exposure when oil rises quickly.

resolution.notes: Backtester should compute this from adjusted USO close prices.

interpretations.meaning: oil has risen quickly over the last twenty trading days

signal_interests.description: Twenty trading day change in the 10-year Treasury yield proxy.
signal_interests.reason: Rules reduce growth technology exposure when long rates rise quickly.

resolution.notes: Backtester should compute this from the configured 10-year Treasury yield series.

interpretations.meaning: long rates have risen quickly over the last twenty trading days

signal_interests.description: Sixty trading day relative strength score used for ranked basket selection.
signal_interests.reason: Portfolio selection policy ranks candidate basket members by medium-term relative strength.

signal_interests.description: Seven day news sentiment score used for ranked basket selection.
signal_interests.reason: Portfolio selection policy ranks candidate basket members by short-term news sentiment.

signal_interests.description: Twenty trading day realized volatility used for ranked basket selection.
signal_interests.reason: Portfolio selection policy penalizes high-volatility candidate basket members.

signal_interests.name: AMD 10 EMA
signal_interests.description: Track price versus the 10-day EMA because the agent report used it as an immediate momentum/support filter.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price above the 10-day EMA indicates short-term momentum remains constructive
interpretations.source_text: **Medium-term Position**: The stock is currently **trading below the 50 SMA ($227.92)**, suggesting the stock is in a **short-term pullback** within the broader bullish trend. The 10 EMA ($213.89) sits just below current price, indicating recent consolidation.

interpretations.meaning: price below the 10-day EMA indicates immediate momentum weakening
interpretations.source_text: **Medium-term Position**: The stock is currently **trading below the 50 SMA ($227.92)**, suggesting the stock is in a **short-term pullback** within the broader bullish trend. The 10 EMA ($213.89) sits just below current price, indicating recent consolidation.

signal_interests.name: AMD 50 SMA
signal_interests.description: Track price versus the 50-day SMA because the agent report used it as medium-term trend support/resistance.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price above the 50-day SMA indicates medium-term trend support or resistance breakout
interpretations.source_text: **Medium-term Position**: The stock is currently **trading below the 50 SMA ($227.92)**, suggesting the stock is in a **short-term pullback** within the broader bullish trend. The 10 EMA ($213.89) sits just below current price, indicating recent consolidation.

interpretations.meaning: price below the 50-day SMA indicates medium-term bearish pressure or failed resistance
interpretations.source_text: **Medium-term Position**: The stock is currently **trading below the 50 SMA ($227.92)**, suggesting the stock is in a **short-term pullback** within the broader bullish trend. The 10 EMA ($213.89) sits just below current price, indicating recent consolidation.

signal_interests.name: AMD 200 SMA
signal_interests.description: Track price versus the 200-day SMA because the agent report used it as the long-term trend anchor.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price above the 200-day SMA indicates long-term trend remains positive
interpretations.source_text: **Macro Trend**: AMD is in a **bullish long-term trend** with the current price ($214.16) trading significantly **above the 200 SMA ($162.63)**, indicating sustained upward momentum over the past year.

interpretations.meaning: price below the 200-day SMA indicates long-term trend breakdown
interpretations.source_text: **Macro Trend**: AMD is in a **bullish long-term trend** with the current price ($214.16) trading significantly **above the 200 SMA ($162.63)**, indicating sustained upward momentum over the past year.

signal_interests.name: AMD RSI 14D
signal_interests.description: Track 14-day RSI because the agent report used RSI as a momentum and overbought/oversold gauge.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: RSI above neutral with room below overbought indicates constructive momentum
RSI deterioration or overbought reversal indicates weakening momentum

signal_interests.name: AMD MACD
signal_interests.description: Track MACD because the agent report used MACD trend/momentum and divergence as decision evidence.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: MACD confirmation indicates positive trend momentum
MACD deterioration or negative crossover indicates weakening trend momentum

signal_interests.name: AMD MACD histogram
signal_interests.description: Track MACD histogram because the agent report used histogram divergence/acceleration as a warning signal.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: improving MACD histogram indicates momentum acceleration
negative or deteriorating MACD histogram indicates momentum deceleration

signal_interests.name: AMD Bollinger Bands 20D
signal_interests.description: Track 20-day Bollinger bands because the agent report used upper/lower bands as support, resistance, and volatility context.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price holding above the middle band or bouncing from lower band indicates constructive support
price rejecting at the upper band or breaking below the lower band indicates downside risk

signal_interests.name: AMD ATR 14D
signal_interests.description: Track 14-day ATR because the agent report used ATR for stop placement, volatility context, and position sizing.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: ATR provides risk sizing and stop distance context, not a standalone directional signal
interpretations.source_text: **ATR**: $8.16 indicates **moderate daily volatility** - healthy for an actively traded stock

interpretations.meaning: rising ATR may require smaller position sizes or wider stops
interpretations.source_text: **ATR**: $8.16 indicates **moderate daily volatility** - healthy for an actively traded stock

signal_interests.name: AMD Support level
signal_interests.description: Track support levels because the agent report referenced support zones for entries, stops, and failure conditions.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price holding above support supports long exposure
price breaking below support implies downside risk or stop trigger

signal_interests.name: AMD Resistance level
signal_interests.description: Track resistance levels because the agent report referenced resistance zones for breakouts and profit targets.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price breaking above resistance supports buy/increase bias
price failing below resistance supports caution or underweight bias

signal_interests.name: AMD Stop loss
signal_interests.description: Track agent-described stop-loss levels as forward-looking risk-control interests.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price above stop keeps thesis active
price below stop invalidates thesis and should reduce exposure

signal_interests.name: AMD Price target
signal_interests.description: Track agent-described price targets as forward-looking portfolio/trading interests.
signal_interests.reason: Extracted from raw agent report artifact to tell the backtester what market data/features matter and how to interpret them.

resolution.notes: Backtester should resolve this interest against its transform registry before promoting it to an executable signal.

data_requirements.notes: Derived from agent report signal interest.

interpretations.meaning: price below target leaves upside potential
price reaching or exceeding target suggests taking profit or reassessing

soft_targets.description: Keep growth technology meaningful, but allow the rules to de-risk during oil and rate stress.
Preserve a liquidity buffer for defensive rotations.

candidate_baskets.description: Growth technology and AI-related equities the strategy may buy or sell.

rules.name: Seed rule: reduce growth tech when oil and rates rise

then.reason: Oil and long rates are rising together.

rules.name: Rotate growth technology to defensive equities when oil/rates pressure is active

then.reason: Rotate from rate-sensitive growth technology into defensive equities.
